title: Sales Process Design
shortSummary: How to build a sales process from scratch: pipeline stages, qualification frameworks, CRM setup, and the metrics that matter.
whyItMatters: Without a process, sales depends on luck and heroics. A repeatable process means predictable revenue and the ability to scale beyond the founder.
coreConcepts: A sales process is a series of defined stages with clear entry and exit criteria
Qualification frameworks (BANT, MEDDIC) help you focus on deals that will close
CRM is not optional — you cannot improve what you do not measure
The goal is a process that works without the founder in every deal
